content:
B2-1: MODIFY (Keep the precedence order, but re-read/re-evaluate immediately before the final replace/rename. A single read-then-write check still races and can let a weaker writer win if both writers saw stale state.)

B2-2: ACCEPT_AS_PROPOSED

B2-3: ACCEPT_AS_PROPOSED

B2-4: MODIFY (Keep the 50/200/600/1200 schedule, but document it as 5 total attempts—initial immediate write + 4 retries—or change the delays so 4 attempts truly spans ~2s. Current attempt-count/math wording conflicts.)

B2-5: MODIFY (Keep the limitation, but remove the unverified "Reset Location" recovery path unless tested; the safe instruction is "drag the divider back." Also say the content remains scrollable if compressed, not specifically "may scroll horizontally".)

B2-6: MODIFY (Keep `confidence` only if Session 2 defines concrete producer rules now: at minimum emit `low` on missing/null hook payload fields or parse failure, and show the reason in the tooltip. If no low-confidence path ships now, drop the field.)

B2-7: MODIFY (Pre-implementation verification must check both whether `/clear` fires SessionStart and whether `/clear` actually resets model/effort to Medium. Only clobber a fresh `last-observed` signal if both are true; otherwise preserve it and document the asymmetry.)
